title: Classic Corned Beef Rye Wrap
description: A tasty twist on the classic deli sandwich. This corned beef rye wrap is perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Preheat a panini press to medium-high heat.
Spread the Russian dressing evenly on the inside of the rye wrap.
Layer the corned beef, lettuce, and onion on the bottom half of the wrap.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Place the top half of the wrap on the filling, pressing gently.
Cook for 3-4 minutes, or until the wrap is crispy and the corned beef is warmed through.
Cut in half and serve immediately.
